summary_one_line: ICC header device-class field at offset 0x0c-0x0f must equal the FOURCC 'nmcl' (cmsSigNamedColorClass) to take the true side.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte device-class signature parsed from the ICC header (input offsets 0x0c-0x0f, read into Icc->DeviceClass) must spell the exact FOURCC 'nmcl' = cmsSigNamedColorClass (0x6e 0x6d 0x63 0x6c). Only this exact 32-bit value reaches the switch arm at cmsio0.c:755; any of the other accepted class FOURCCs (e.g. 'mntr') diverts to a different case and never visits the blocker line.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All three winning seeds carry 6e 6d 63 6c ('nmcl') at offset 0x0c-0x0f, exactly the cmsSigNamedColorClass constant; the winner is the only fuzzer whose 10/10 trials resolve the branch (hitcount 5) and at d=1 line 755 the W side shows T=3 (true side taken).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All loser seeds carry 6d 6e 74 72 ('mntr', cmsSigDisplayClass) at offset 0x0c-0x0f, which dispatches to case cmsSigDisplayClass (d=1 L750 T=10) and never reaches the named-color case; naive blocked 10/10 with hitcount 0 on the branch.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile adds integer-CMP interception that writes the switch comparison into CMP_MAP keyed by operand-distance bucket. As mutated bytes at 0x0c-0x0f approach the 'nmcl' constant, a closer Hamming/prefix bucket is opened and the input is preserved as corpus, giving value_profile a gradient toward the exact 4-byte FOURCC. naive has only edge counters and no such CMP feedback, so it must blindly land all four bytes by havoc and never does within budget.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the switch arm case cmsSigNamedColorClass at cmsio0.c:755, whose true side is globally blocked.
The switched value cl is Icc->DeviceClass, read from the parsed ICC header in _cmsReadHeader.
All three winning seeds contain the bytes 6e 6d 63 6c ('nmcl') at offset 0x0c-0x0f.
All loser seeds contain the bytes 6d 6e 74 72 ('mntr', display class) at offset 0x0c-0x0f.
The winner takes the true side at the blocker line 755 while the loser does not.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 755  T=3 F=0  T=0 F=10  case cmsSigNamedColorClass:  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The loser instead dispatches to the display-class arm at line 750.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 750  T=0 F=3  T=10 F=0  case cmsSigDisplayClass:

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile resolved 10/10 with hitcount 5 while naive blocked 10/10 with hitcount 0.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=5  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile's CMP feedback opens a new CMP_MAP bucket as operands approach matching, preserving the input as corpus.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has only edge-counter feedback with no CMP introspection.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
**Feedback**: per-edge hit-count bucket; a new bucket triggers a
corpus-add (LibAFL `MaxMapFeedback` over the edge map).

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient (value_profile vs naive), not I2SRandReplace, so lineage dash-row verification is not mandatory. The MECHANISM CONTEXT for value_profile explicitly states it has no I2SRandReplace and no dash rows, only CMP_MAP distance-bucket feedback, so the gradient mechanism is read directly from technique knowledge plus the byte-diff convergence onto the 'nmcl' constant.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with a switch on a 4-byte input field gated to one exact constant where naive resolves the arm as often as value_profile within the same budget (no value_profile advantage), which would show the CMP_MAP gradient is not what enables the winner.

weakest_evidence_point: The mechanism attribution is inferred from technique descriptions and byte convergence; no lineage trace directly confirms a value_profile CMP_MAP bucket drove the discovery of the 'nmcl' bytes.
